TextView.android:text:
Motivation

Staying motivated is key to achieving your health and fitness goals. It helps you stay consistent, overcome challenges, and build a strong mindset.

Daily Motivation Tips:

1. Set clear goals
Know what you want to achieve and stay focused on it.

2. Stay consistent
Small daily efforts lead to big results over time.

3. Believe in yourself
Confidence is the foundation of success.

4. Stay positive
A positive mindset helps you push through difficulties.

5. Track your progress
Seeing improvement keeps you motivated.

6. Surround yourself with positivity
Be around people and content that inspire you.

7. Never give up
Success comes from persistence and discipline.

8. Celebrate small wins
Every step forward matters.

Remember: Your only limit is you. Stay strong and keep going!
